reasoning: Query asks for budget accommodation under ¥5,000/night in Kyoto. The tool returns a general hotel list with no price data — no price_band, no fee fields. The hard budget constraint (5,000 yen) is completely unaddressed. Names and coordinates appear real and grounded but no filtering for cheap options occurred.
missing_data: price_band or nightly_rate data needed to filter by ≤¥5,000; hostel/guesthouse lodging_type filter would help; capsule hotels absent.
improvement_hint: Add price_band filter param to get_hotels; populate price_band/nightly_rate fields from OSM/Wikidata tags so budget queries can actually be filtered.

reasoning: Query asks for free things to do in Tokyo on a small budget. Response returns get_spots which includes fee and price_band fields. Hamarikyu Gardens has fee=yes/price_band=low — not free — and appears first. Some spots like Eitai Bridge and Mt Takao do have price_band=free. No ranking by free-entry status occurs; paid venue leads the results.
missing_data: Free-entry filtering or ranking; Shinjuku Gyoen, Ueno Park (free grounds), Tokyo Metropolitan Government Building observatory all missing.
improvement_hint: Add price_band filter param to get_spots so free-entry results can be surfaced first when query contains free/無料/gratis intent.

reasoning: Query asks for free-entry temples and shrines in Kamakura. Hybrid search returns a travel planning page about Yokosuka-area temples with admission fees (600 yen), Eiheiji (700 yen) in Fukui, and a cat-temple in Fukui — none are in Kamakura and none are free. The retrieval completely misses the target location and topic.
missing_data: Kamakura-specific free temples: Tsurugaoka Hachimangu (free grounds), Engakuji grounds, Hokokuji, Zeniarai Benzaiten — all absent.
wrong_data: Top results are from Yokosuka/Fukui, not Kamakura. Highly misleading for the user.
improvement_hint: Hybrid search should support prefecture/municipality constraint for search_hybrid; alternatively route via get_spots with municipality=鎌倉市 and filter price_band=free.

reasoning: Query asks about Fukuoka yatai (food stalls) under ¥500/meal. Tool returns get_local_food with 1911 items, mostly MAFF GI products (tea, blowfish, chicken) and generic tourism descriptions. No yatai venues, stall locations, or price information at all. The ¥500 constraint is ignored.
missing_data: Fukuoka yatai locations (Nakasu, Tenjin, Nagahama); price per dish info; street food context. Scraped data includes Cherry Blossoms tourism entry — irrelevant.
wrong_data: Cherry Blossoms entry labeled as regional_dish is clearly a scraping artefact.
improvement_hint: Add venue-type filter (yatai/street_food) to get_local_food; fix scraper to reject entries where name/description contain obvious non-food content (tourism page titles).

reasoning: Query asks for free-entry shrines in Kyoto. search_area returns 100 Kyoto shrine attractions from Wikidata, but no price_band or fee data is present in search_area results, making it impossible to identify free-entry ones. Results are shrine-type entities matching the query but usability for the free-entry constraint is nil.
missing_data: price_band/fee fields in search_area results; well-known free Kyoto shrines: Fushimi Inari (free), Yasaka Shrine (free), Shimogamo (free grounds) not distinguishable.
improvement_hint: Propagate price_band and fee fields into search_area result schema so LLM can filter; add free-entry hint in descriptions for major shrines.

reasoning: Query asks for cheap eats in Sapporo under ¥1,500 including local markets. Tool returns Hokkaido GI foods (Yubari melon, nagaimo, potatoes) — premium ingredients, not cheap meal options. No market venues, no restaurant names, no pricing. Sapporo-specific cheap food spots (Nijo Market, Curb ramen) absent.
missing_data: Nijo Market / Sapporo Central Wholesale Market; cheap local restaurants; soup curry spots; ramen shops; pricing data for venues.
improvement_hint: get_local_food should support venue_type=market filter; add Sapporo city-level cheap food venues to municipal scrape data.

reasoning: Query seeks hostels in Osaka under ¥3,000/night. Response has lodging_type:hostel entries (Alex's room) but no price data. Also mixes in ANA Crowne Plaza and DoubleTree (clearly not budget). Budget constraint of ¥3,000 cannot be verified for any result.
missing_data: nightly_rate or price_band fields for all entries; hostels like J-Hoppers, Osaka Hana Hostel absent; no way to identify ¥3,000 options.
improvement_hint: Add price_band param to get_hotels; flag luxury hotels vs budget with a tier field; source nightly rate from official hotel pages during scrape.

reasoning: Query asks where to buy cheap souvenirs in 100-yen shops or supermarkets. Tool returns Aichi GI food products (Hatcho miso, winter melon, shiso flower) — official geographic designations, not souvenir shop locations. No 100-yen shop data exists in MCP. Wrong tool for intent; souvenir shops not in corpus at all.
missing_data: Daiso/Seria locations; supermarket chains; souvenir shop data; any retail venue information entirely absent from corpus.
improvement_hint: Recognize retail/shop intent and route to search_hybrid or add a get_shopping tool; 100-yen chain store data (Daiso) could be added from OSM.

reasoning: Query asks for best free outdoor parks in Japan. Hybrid returns k=10 results mixing parks (Ukima Park, Nishiyama Park with free zoo), nature spots, and municipal navigation pages. Some genuinely free parks appear (Nishiyama mentions 無料). Only 10 results with limited names — sparse for a national scope query.
missing_data: Major free national parks: Ueno Park, Shinjuku Gyoen free areas, Maruyama Park Sapporo, Kenroku-en surrounding areas — not surfaced. Result count too low.
improvement_hint: Increase k for broad national queries; add price_band=free filter to hybrid search; deduplicate duplicate spots (Nishiyama Park appears twice in results).

reasoning: Korean query for free outdoor spots in Tokyo. get_spots returns detailed data with price_band and fee fields including Hamarikyu (fee=yes, first result) and Eitai Bridge (free), Mt Takao (free). Korean names (name_ko) are populated. However free spots are not ranked first and paid Hamarikyu leads. Agent can extract free ones but needs to filter manually.
missing_data: Yoyogi Park, Shinjuku Gyoen (outer free areas), Ueno Park, Hibiya Park — large free urban parks not in top results.
improvement_hint: Support price_band=free filter in get_spots; rank free-entry items higher when query language contains 무료/free/gratis pattern.

reasoning: Arabic query for cheap/free Nagano spots. get_spots returns Nagano results with price_band fields — Matsushiro Castle has fee=no/price_band=free and is in the results. Kamikochi, Tatsuoka Castle also shown. Response provides reasonable starting material. Some items lack price_band (Kamikochi entry missing price_band). Arabic translation not provided (name_ar absent).
missing_data: Arabic translations absent (name_ar not a field); price_band missing on several spots; cheap onsen day-trip options not included.
improvement_hint: Extend multilingual support to Arabic for name fields; ensure price_band populated for top-tier spots like Kamikochi.

reasoning: Luxury honeymoon Hokkaido query. Response surfaces onsen_ryokan from Nihon Hito-yu wo Mamoru Kai (authentic secretive hot springs association) — genuinely relevant premium category. Also returns ANA Holiday Inn which is mid-range not luxury. No pricing or luxury tier differentiation available.
missing_data: Luxury tier signal missing; Noboribetsu Grand Hotel, Toya Sun Palace, and other recognized luxury properties absent; no room type info (private onsen bath).
improvement_hint: Add luxury_tier or star_rating field to hotel records; filter lodging_type=onsen_ryokan as priority for honeymoon+luxury queries.

reasoning: Query asks for luxury kaiseki ryokan in Kyoto with private open-air bath. Response returns same generic Kyoto hotel list as R-276 (AB Hotel, APA Garden Court, Comfort Inn, DoubleTree) — budget/mid-range hotels, none are kaiseki ryokan with rotenburo. High-end ryokan (Tawaraya, Hiiragiya, Sumiya) entirely absent.
missing_data: Luxury machiya ryokan with kaiseki: Tawaraya, Hiiragiya, Sumiya, Kyoto Kitcho — completely absent. No onsen_ryokan type results for Kyoto.
improvement_hint: Add lodging_type=onsen_ryokan filter; scrape or source Nihon Hito-yu / luxury ryokan associations for Kyoto; add kaiseki tag to relevant hotels.

reasoning: Query asks for luxury ocean-view resort hotels in Okinawa for honeymoon with unlimited budget. First result is unnamed hostel (Korean-only name), second is a guesthouse. DoubleTree and Hilton Chatan Resort appear but no luxury resort differentiation — no tier/star rating. Premier luxury properties (Aman, Halekulani, The Ritz-Carlton Okinawa) absent.
missing_data: Luxury ocean-view resorts: Halekulani Okinawa, The Ritz-Carlton Okinawa, Aman Naha, Hyatt Regency Naha — all absent; no ocean_view or sea_facing field.
improvement_hint: Add luxury_tier field and beach/ocean_view tag; prioritize lodging_type=hotel with high quality signals for luxury queries.

reasoning: French luxury honeymoon Kyoto+Nara query. Tool fetches Nara hotels. JW Marriott Nara and Hotel Nikko Nara appear — genuinely high-end options. Also includes onsen_ryokan from Hito-yu-kai (Yado Yunosato in Totsukawa — remote but authentic). Motel entry (ホテルハグハグ) is inappropriate for a luxury context but not harmful. French translations absent.
missing_data: French translations (name_fr) absent; Kyoto not queried (only Nara); no room amenity data for kaiseki/private bath filter.
improvement_hint: For multi-prefecture queries, fan out to both Kyoto and Nara; add French to translation pipeline; exclude love-hotel/motel types from luxury-intent results.

reasoning: Query asks for free/cheap sake tasting in Niigata. get_local_specialty returns 7 items including major brands (Koshi no Kanbai, Hakkaisan, Kubota) with Wikidata descriptions. Brands identified, brewery locations implied. No actual tasting venue addresses or fee info, but LLM can use brand names to guide user to breweries. Useful starting point.
missing_data: Specific brewery visitor center hours/fees; Niigata Ponshukan (sake tasting facility at Niigata Station) absent; tasting event info.
improvement_hint: Add venue-type=sake_brewery to get_local_specialty or get_spots; include tasting hall hours if available from official brewery pages.

reasoning: Korean query for cheap Sapporo restaurants/markets under ¥1,000/meal. Response returns Hokkaido GI food products (Yubari melon, nagaimo, sea cucumber) with Korean translations — products, not restaurant venues. Korean translations are present and accurate. No restaurant or market venue data at all.
missing_data: Nijo Market, Sapporo Central Market, ramen shops, soup curry restaurants, gyudon chains — none present. No venue/restaurant data in corpus.
improvement_hint: Add restaurant/market venue type to get_local_food or create get_local_restaurants tool; source affordable dining venues from municipal tourism pages.

reasoning: Query about budget Yakushima trip with free hiking and cheap accommodation. get_spots with municipality=屋久島 works well — returns Yakushima island, Jomon Sugi (free trail hike), lighthouse. Also returns 屋久島青少年旅行村 campsite with explicit pricing (¥440/night for adults) — directly useful for budget constraint. Good specificity and grounding.
missing_data: Yakusugi Land entry fee info; Shiratani Unsuikyo free areas; more cheap accommodation options like hostels.
improvement_hint: Populate price_band on campsite entries; surface more lodging types (campsite, hostel) alongside attraction spots for budget queries.

reasoning: Vietnamese budget travel Kyoto query seeking accommodation under ¥5,000 and free spots. Response returns same generic Kyoto hotel list (same as R-276, R-288) — AB Hotel, APA, Comfort Inn, DoubleTree. No price data, no Vietnamese translations, no free attractions. Budget and free-spots constraint entirely unmet.
missing_data: Vietnamese translations (name_vi) absent; price data absent; hostels like Guest House Toco, Kyoto Utano Youth Hostel absent; free attractions not covered.
improvement_hint: Add Vietnamese to translation pipeline; implement price_band filter in get_hotels; combine hotel query with free-spots search for compound budget queries.

reasoning: Query about free/cheap Tokyo museums. Hybrid search returns excellent results: international museum day event (Taito ward free entry list with phone numbers), Minon Music Museum (explicitly noted as free in description), Tokyo National Museum, Tokyo Toy Museum, Edo-Tokyo Museum. Top result is highly specific and directly actionable for free entry.
missing_data: National Museum of Nature and Science permanent free areas; Science Museum free zones; minor gap in coverage but overall strong.
improvement_hint: Minor: add price_band=free signal to wikidata results where description mentions 無料 so LLM can filter more easily.

reasoning: Spanish query for free attractions in Nara. get_spots returns Nara results with price_band fields: Kofukuji temple and Takamatsuzuka Tomb both have price_band=free, Yoshino Mountain (outdoor, free). Good data quality and Spanish user can benefit from multilingual names. Not all spots have price_band populated (some missing).
missing_data: Nara Deer Park (itself free); Kasuga Taisha outer grounds (free); price_band missing on several spots like Mt. Yoshino.
improvement_hint: Fill price_band for remaining Nara must_see spots; explicitly note when grounds are free but inner sanctums have fees (common pattern in Nara temples).

reasoning: Query seeks most exclusive ryokan in Hakone with private open-air bath and kaiseki. get_hotels for Kanagawa returns: Aoki House hostel, Guest House Kamejikan, Hilton Odawara (resort but not Hakone ryokan), UR apartment building. No Hakone-specific ryokan, no onsen_ryokan lodging type visible. Luxury constraint entirely unmet.
missing_data: Hakone classic ryokan: Gyozan-so, Gora Kadan, Hakone Ginyu — all absent. Hito-yu-kai members in Kanagawa not surfaced in truncated results.
wrong_data: UR都市機構 apartment block is a long-term rental public housing, not a tourist accommodation.
improvement_hint: Filter out long-term residential properties (UR, mansion) from hotel results; add municipality=箱根町 filter option; surface hito_yu_kai type entries prominently for luxury+onsen queries.

reasoning: German query for exclusive luxury onsen ryokan in Beppu. Response returns hito_yu_kai onsen ryokan entries from Oita — 山の宿 寒の地獄旅館 and 山あいの宿 喜安屋 are authentic but in Kokonoe/Yufuin area, not Beppu city. Onsenyado Hamayu Nagi is in Beppu (coordinates confirm). German translations absent. Mid-tier match for the luxury intent.
missing_data: German translations absent; Beppu-specific luxury ryokan (Suginoi Hotel, Yufuin Floral Village) not present; no luxury tier signal.
improvement_hint: Add German to translation pipeline; add municipality filter for Beppu specifically; add luxury_tier signal to differentiate premium hito_yu_kai members.

reasoning: Chinese query asking how to experience Kyushu local food culture cheaply with affordable restaurants/markets. Tool queries Kumamoto GI foods — returns igusa (rush grass), tatami facing, and red cattle. These are premium/agricultural GI products, not cheap eating venue recommendations. No restaurant or market data. Response truncated at 500 of 648.
missing_data: Kumamoto/Kyushu cheap food venues: Amu Plaza food halls, Basashi (horse sashimi) affordable options, local izakaya; market venues like Kami-Tori Shopping Street absent.
wrong_data: Igusa/tatami-facing is a non-food craft product incorrectly appearing in food results — category mismatch.
improvement_hint: Fix category filtering to exclude non-edible GI products (igusa, tatami) from food results; add venue_type=restaurant to get_local_food.

reasoning: Query asks for free-admission Japanese cultural festivals worth attending. get_festivals for Aomori returns 2 local items (Hachinohe Sansha Taisai, Aomori Nebuta) plus UNESCO heritage items from Akita and Saitama — not Aomori. No admission fee data for any festival. Aomori Nebuta is famous and relevant but the query asks nationally, not just Aomori.
missing_data: National scope coverage lacking — only Aomori queried; admission info absent for all festivals; Gion Matsuri (Kyoto, free street viewing), Awa Odori (Tokushima, free street sections) not covered.
wrong_data: Dainichido Bugaku is in Akita (not Aomori) and Kawagoe Hikawa is in Saitama — scope=national_japan but surfaced under Aomori query is misleading.
improvement_hint: For nationally-scoped festival queries, fan out across all prefectures or use search_hybrid; add admission_fee field to festival records; clarify scope in national_heritage section.
